name: Vinay Kumar Jangid
title: iOS & Flutter Developer
tagline: Building high-quality iOS and Android apps — Swift, SwiftUI, Flutter, and on-device ML.

seo.title: Vinay Kumar Jangid | iOS & Flutter Developer
seo.description: Hire Vinay Kumar Jangid — iOS & Flutter developer in Jaipur with 3 years of experience. Swift, SwiftUI, Flutter, Firebase, GraphQL, TFLite, and App Store / Play Store delivery.

bio: Results-driven iOS & Flutter Developer with 3 years of experience designing, developing, and deploying high-quality mobile apps for iOS and Android. Skilled in Swift, SwiftUI, Flutter, and modern mobile frameworks to build efficient, scalable, and visually engaging apps. Experienced in native iOS development, cross-platform solutions, secure authentication, local database management, and machine learning-powered mobile features.

education.school: University of Maharaja College, Jaipur, Rajasthan

iosDemos.title: Native iOS craft
iosDemos.subtitle: Swift · SwiftUI / UIKit
iosDemos.description: I build and ship production iOS apps with Swift and SwiftUI — clean architecture (MVVM/MVC), smooth animations, and App Store polish.

iosDemos.title: Camera & capture
iosDemos.subtitle: Field-ready pipelines
iosDemos.description: Custom camera and document-scanner flows — OCR, PDF generation, image resizing, and platform-channel bridges between Flutter and native Swift.

iosDemos.title: On-device ML
iosDemos.subtitle: TFLite · offline
iosDemos.description: Machine learning-powered capture with TFLite, plus Hive for offline-first workflows that work when the network drops.

iosDemos.title: Ship & integrate
iosDemos.subtitle: Flutter + native bridges
iosDemos.description: End-to-end delivery with Firebase, GraphQL, push notifications, Apple/Google Sign-In, deep linking, and release to App Store & Play Store.

experience.company: The Whole Digi Doodle Software Pvt. Ltd.
experience.summary: Building and shipping Flutter and native iOS apps with a focus on performance and UX — including ML-powered inspection, camera workflows, and offline Hive storage.
Owned app lifecycle from concept to App Store & Play Store. Integrated Firebase, push notifications, Apple Sign-In, and GraphQL across production mobile products.
Independent client work — jewelry management, manufacturing ERP, and medical e-learning apps built end-to-end in Swift / SwiftUI.
Personal products built end-to-end — Indopin and Raddiwalla with Flutter apps for iOS & Android plus React websites.
Contributed to creative iOS apps with focus on architecture, animations, and UI/UX — building foundations in Swift under senior guidance.

projects.title: Evolv Solutions
projects.tagline: AI vehicle imaging for dealerships — App Store & Play Store
projects.description: Professional vehicle photography powered by AI. Capture on the forecourt; Evolv processes backgrounds, spec checks, and publish-ready imagery at scale for car dealers.

overview.problem: Field inspections needed reliable photo capture and offline workflows — generic camera UIs and always-online apps don't hold up on-site.
howItWorks: Inspector captures guided vehicle photos through a ML-assisted camera flow.
TFLite powers on-device image analysis during capture.
Hive stores inspection data locally so work continues offline.
Platform channels bridge Flutter UI with native Swift camera capabilities; Google Sign-In handles auth.
whatIDid: Built Flutter + Swift camera and inspection workflows with platform channels.
Integrated TFLite for ML-powered image processing.
Implemented Hive offline database and sync-friendly local storage.
Shipped secure Google Sign-In authentication.

projects.title: Indopin
projects.tagline: Personal product — iOS, Android & React website
projects.description: Personal project: business management across Flutter (iOS & Android) and a React website — real-time billing, inventory tracking, and vendor communication.

overview.problem: I wanted a full business stack I owned end-to-end — billing, inventory, and vendors on phone and web, not three separate tools.
howItWorks: Flutter apps for iOS and Android handle day-to-day billing and inventory.
React website covers the same business flows on web.
Node.js + GraphQL API and WebSocket keep mobile and web in sync.
Firebase and push notifications surface real-time updates.
whatIDid: Designed and built the full personal product stack alone.
Shipped Flutter clients for both iOS and Android.
Built the React website for web operators.
Implemented Node.js / GraphQL, WebSocket, Firebase, and push.

projects.title: Raddiwalla
projects.tagline: Personal product — scrap marketplace for iOS, Android & web
projects.description: Personal project: Raddiwalla connects scrap buyers and sellers — Flutter apps for iOS & Android plus a React website for listings, orders, and day-to-day trading.

overview.problem: Scrap trade still runs on calls and WhatsApp — buyers and sellers needed one place for listings, rates, and orders on mobile and web.
howItWorks: Flutter apps on iOS and Android let users browse rates, post scrap, and manage pickups.
React website covers the same marketplace flows for desktop operators.
Shared backend (Node.js / GraphQL + Firebase) keeps mobile and web in sync.
Push notifications alert users when listings, orders, or rates change.
whatIDid: Designed and built Raddiwalla as a personal end-to-end product.
Shipped Flutter clients for both Android and iOS.
Built the React website for web marketplace use.
Implemented shared API, auth, and notification flows.

projects.title: Daylight
projects.tagline: iOS — better energy for your home
projects.description: Native iOS app for home energy tracking and upgrades — SwiftUI with secure auth, push notifications, Intercom, GraphQL, and deep linking. iOS only.

overview.problem: Users needed a polished native iOS experience with secure sign-in, notifications, and support — without janky web wrappers.
howItWorks: SwiftUI screens deliver the primary product experience.
Apple Sign-In and Firebase secure access.
GraphQL feeds personalized content; Intercom handles support.
Push notifications and deep links bring users back to the right screen.
whatIDid: Built the SwiftUI app with MVVM-friendly structure.
Integrated Apple Sign-In, Firebase, and GraphQL.
Wired Intercom, push notifications, and deep linking.
Focused on personalized UX and App Store–ready polish.

projects.title: Interpretrain
projects.tagline: iOS — interpreter training with play & record
projects.description: Education app for interpreters — dual-channel play & record, cloud practice storage, scoring, and offline training. Native iOS.

overview.problem: Learners needed faster content delivery and timely alerts when new material or updates went live.
howItWorks: UIKit Storyboard app presents educational content.
SDWebImage optimizes media loading for smoother browsing.
Firebase backs data and messaging.
Push notifications keep students informed in real time.
whatIDid: Enhanced the Storyboard iOS client for content delivery.
Integrated Firebase and push notification flows.
Optimized image loading with SDWebImage.
Improved reliability of real-time learner updates.

projects.title: Digicat Jewelry IT
projects.tagline: Freelance — jewelry management with local storage & media
projects.description: Freelance iOS jewelry management app — Storyboard client with Firebase sync and SDWebImage for catalogs and media-heavy inventory workflows.

overview.problem: A jewelry client needed reliable catalog and media handling on iOS — locally usable and synced when online.
howItWorks: Storyboard iOS app manages jewelry catalog and ops screens.
Local storage keeps catalogs available without constant network.
SDWebImage loads and caches product media smoothly.
Firebase backs sync and remote data for the freelance delivery.
whatIDid: Delivered the Storyboard jewelry management client as freelance work.
Implemented local storage for offline-friendly catalogs.
Integrated Firebase for backend sync.
Built media pipelines with SDWebImage.

projects.title: Jewelry ERP
projects.tagline: Freelance — production & workflow ERP for manufacturing
projects.description: Freelance ERP app for jewelry manufacturing — production and workflow automation built with SwiftUI, MVVM, and Firebase.

overview.problem: A manufacturing client needed structured production tracking on mobile — not spreadsheets and missed handoffs.
howItWorks: SwiftUI + MVVM models production and workflow states.
Firebase stores ERP documents and auth.
Operators advance manufacturing stages from the phone.
Delivered as an independent freelance engagement.
whatIDid: Owned the freelance SwiftUI ERP client end-to-end.
Applied MVVM for clear production screen architecture.
Integrated Firebase for data and authentication.
Focused on manufacturing workflow automation.

projects.title: Testpaper Live
projects.tagline: Freelance — medical e-learning with video & deep linking
projects.description: Freelance e-learning app for medical students — SwiftUI + MVVM with SDWebImage for content media, video playback, and deep linking into lessons.

overview.problem: A medical-education client needed structured lessons and deep links into the right paper — not a generic video browser.
howItWorks: SwiftUI + MVVM presents courses and test papers.
SDWebImage handles thumbnails and content media.
Video playback and deep links open the correct lesson or paper.
Shipped as freelance work for the education client.
whatIDid: Built the freelance SwiftUI e-learning client with MVVM.
Integrated SDWebImage for smooth media loading.
Delivered video lesson flows and deep linking.
Focused on medical-student study UX.
